caption: A man with a distinctive tall, grey, textured hairstyle and glasses sits in a recording studio setting, wearing a white collared shirt and a red bow tie. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone and wears large over-ear headphones. The background consists of a wall decorated with several framed photographs and a clothing rack with garments, including a shirt with "LEE" visible on it. On the left side of the scene, a logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible, with "BOSS TALK 101" appearing again in red and white text further to the right. Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking with slight shifts in his facial expression and head posture, while the camera and environment remain static.
